codeReview.summary: Implementation fully addresses the blocking issues. Both required endpoints are properly implemented with correct authorization, pagination, search, filtering, and comprehensive error handling.

summary: The feature correctly implements GET /api/v1/admin/users (paginated list with search and role filtering) and GET /api/v1/admin/users/{id} (user detail with profile and stats). Both endpoints properly enforce admin-only authorization via require_admin dependency, handle invalid UUID formats (400), missing users (404), unauthenticated requests (401), and non-admin users (403). Service layer uses existing NotFoundException pattern correctly. 11 comprehensive test cases added covering all endpoints and error scenarios. Implementation follows existing codebase patterns and conventions.
